dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace exhibits perfect adherence to the governance framework. Every reasoning span, including the rules-context-loader and alignment-engine, concluded with a schema_validation_success event. The rules-context-loader successfully ingested the architectural constraints with high fidelity.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map span shows an extraordinary depth of reasoning, producing 64,985 completion tokens. This indicates a highly granular mapping of work items to system evolution, significantly exceeding the baseline's reasoning density and providing a robust causal chain for architectural changes.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Unlike the baseline, this trace explicitly includes the alignment-engine span, which is dedicated to identifying and resolving architectural tensions. The flow from evolution mapping to alignment and finally to intent generation demonstrates a mature resolution of trade-offs.
